# 🌅 Morning Digest — Thursday, May 28, 2026

## 📬 Emails Needing Attention

**1. helpdesk@lisinskifirm.com | Re: Service Ticket [ID:0028659] Power Automate Connection Breaks | 🔴 High**
IT Helpdesk is waiting on your response. They advise migrating the flows to a service account and moving ownership to a shared mailbox — they need you to provide a **preferred email UPN** for that mailbox before they can proceed. This is actively blocking the automation fix.

**2. saholmes@lisinskifirm.com | Fw: "EPMO Project Intake Form" submission received | 🟡 Medium**
Samantha forwarded the EPMO Project Intake Form submission twice (yesterday and today) with the note "Its here" / "This was submitted." Your Teams thread confirms you asked her to forward to Danny and Jessica to flag it as urgent from both EPMO and business perspectives — Samantha re-forwarded. Worth confirming Danny and Jessica received it and will act.

**3. no-reply@asana.com | Thursday - tasks due soon: 4 | 🟡 Medium**
Asana daily digest: 4 tasks are due today — including 3C Requirements Gathering, Define and Build Access Matrix, and Home Page Content. Review your Asana board for the full list early in the day.

**4. llfcommunications@lisinskifirm.com | Legal News: Recent USCIS Policy Memo on Adjustment of Status | 🟡 Medium**
Firm communications sent out a briefing on USCIS Policy Memo 601-0199 (issued May 21, 2026) regarding Adjustment of Status. Worth a read for situational awareness given the legal team's focus areas.

**5. lcruz@lisinskifirm.com | SOP Hub Training Recordings & Resource Access | 🟢 Low**
Quality Team shared training recordings and resource links for the SOP Hub migration (Inventory Control + Project Management). FYI — the live Q&A session is on your calendar this afternoon.

---

## 💬 Teams — Active Conversations

**Santiago ↔ Samantha Holmes (Direct Chat)**
Active thread about escalating the EPMO Project Intake Form to Danny and Jessica. Santiago clarified the intent: forward the email so Danny and Jessica understand it's urgent from the business perspective, not just EPMO. Samantha confirmed she re-forwarded. **Follow up**: ping Danny/Jessica directly to confirm receipt if you have not already.

**Santiago ↔ Jhara Ochoa (Direct Chat)**
Active bilateral conversation — Jhara reached out to discuss how to proceed with KYR (likely Know Your Rights / Detention Prevention context). Santiago was outside without headphones, offered to connect by call later. Jhara responded "Listo!!" suggesting it may have resolved or they will reconnect. Context: you have two Detention Prevention meetings with Jhara today — she is clearly moving fast on this.

**Dev/Project Chat (branch creation)**
Santiago shared the confirmed dev deployment pipeline: Claude Code → GitHub → Vercel → Supabase. He is planning to work on it tomorrow afternoon (Friday). No blocking action needed today.

**Jean Garcia's Team Chat**
Jean sent a survey update: HR review underway, survey launches June 3rd, communication going out June 2nd. No action needed from Santiago — just FYI.

---

---

## ⚡ Immediate Action

**Two things need your attention right now:**

1. **Reply to IT Helpdesk (Ticket #0028659)** — They are waiting on a preferred email UPN to create the shared mailbox for the Power Automate flows. This is blocking the fix. Quick reply = unblocked.

2. **Confirm Danny & Jessica received the EPMO escalation** — Samantha re-forwarded, but given you described this as business-critical, a direct ping to Danny Miller and Jessica Kim in Teams would close the loop and ensure it is on their radar today.

You have two overlapping slots at 12:30 PM (DP Pilot RingCentral + BCP Weekly) — decide now which one takes priority so you are not caught mid-meeting.
